title.ko: 스프링; 완충장치; 진동감쇠 수단
title.en: SPRINGS; SHOCK-ABSORBERS; MEANS FOR DAMPING VIBRATION

definition.ko: 스프링 마찰형; 유체형; 자기형 F16F1/00, F16F3/00; F16F5/00, F16F9/00; F16F6/00 진동 댐퍼 또는 충격 흡수 마찰형; 유체형 F16F7/00, F16F11/00; F16F9/00, F16F11/00 스프링 및 진동 댐퍼 또는 완충장치를 결합한 유닛 F16F13/00 진동, 균형 억제 F16F15/00

title.ko: 스프링(유체를 사용한 것 5/00, 9/00)
title.en: Springs (working with fluid F16F0005000000, F16F0009000000)

title.ko: 내부 마찰이 적은 금속 또는 그 외의 재료로 된 것(1/36이 우선) ; 재료에 관련하지 않는 스파이럴스프링, 토션스프링, 판스프링, 컵스프링, 링스프링 또는 그와 유사한 스프링
title.en: made of steel or other material having low internal friction (F16F0001360000 takes precedence); Wound, torsion, leaf, cup, ring or the like springs, the material of the spring not being relevant
Wound springs
with turns lying in cylindrical surfaces
with turns lying in mainly conical surfaces
Spiral springs with turns lying substantially in plane surfaces
Attachments or mountings
comprising inserts or spacers between the windings for changing the mechanical or physical characteristics of the spring
Torsion springs consisting of bars or tubes
Attachments or mountings

title.ko: 판스프링(Leaf spring)
title.en: Leaf springs
with layers, e.g. anti-friction layers, or with rollers between the leaves
with means for modifying the spring characteristic
Lubrication; Covers, e.g. for retaining lubricant

title.ko: 부속품 또는 장착부품(B60G 11/10이 우선)
title.en: Attachments or mountings  (B60G0011100000 takes precedence)
comprising cylindrical metal pins pivoted in close-fitting sleeves
comprising intermediate pieces made of rubber or similar elastic material

title.ko: 컵 스프링; 접시모양 원반(disk) 스프링(다이어프램 F16J 3/00)
title.en: Cup springs; Dished disc springs (diaphragms F16J0003000000)
Ring springs, i.e. annular bodies deformed radially due to axial load

title.ko: 합성 수지(plastics)로 만들어지는 것,예.고무;내마찰성이 큰 물질로 된 것
title.en: made of plastics, e.g. rubber; made of material having high internal friction
made of steel wool or compressed hair
made of cork, wood or the like material
made of fibre reinforced plastics
Leaf springs
of foam-like material, e.g. sponge rubber

title.ko: 삽입물이나 보조적인 부가물에 특징이 있는 것(1/366, 1/387이 우선)
title.en: characterised by inserts or auxiliary extension elements, e.g. for rigidification (F16F0001366000, F16F0001387000 take precedence)

title.ko: 특별한 모양에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by having a particular shape
having a spherical or the like shape

title.ko: 적어도 한 표면에 돌출부(projection), 마개(stud), 톱니(serraitions)와 같은 것을 갖는 것(1/387이 우선)
title.en: having projections, studs, serrations or the like on at least one surface (F16F0001387000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 구멍이나 개구부가 있는 것(1/387이 우선)
title.en: having holes or openings (F16F0001387000 takes precedence)
characterised by arrangements for controlling the spring temperature, e.g. by cooling
with a sleeve of elastic material between a rigid outer sleeve and a rigid inner sleeve or pin
comprising means for modifying the rigidity in particular directions
with spherical or conical sleeves
consisting of a stack of similar elements separated by non-elastic intermediate layers
the spring consisting of generally conically arranged elements
characterised by the mode of stressing
loaded mainly in compression
loaded mainly in tension
loaded mainly in torsion
loaded mainly in shear
loaded in combined stresses
loaded in compression and shear

title.ko: 몇 개의 스프링으로 구성되는 스프링 장치, 예. 필요한 스프링특성을 갖도록 한 스프링장치(유체스프링을 포함하는 것 5/00, 13/00)
title.en: Spring units consisting of several springs, e.g. for obtaining a desired spring characteristic (including fluid springs F16F0005000000, F16F0013000000)
with springs made of steel or of other material having low internal friction
composed only of wound springs
of which some are placed around others in such a way that they damp each other by mutual friction
combined with chambers filled with gas or liquid

title.ko: 내부마찰이 큰 재료로 되어 있는 스프링을 갖는 것. 예. 고무
title.en: with springs made of a material having high internal friction, e.g. rubber

title.ko: 플라스틱과 같은 물질로 만들어진 여러 개의 스프링을 포함하는 것
title.en: Units comprising several springs made of plastics or the like material (F16F0001400000 takes precedence)
the springs being of different materials, e.g. having different types of rubber
combined with springs made of steel or other material having low internal friction
the steel spring being in contact with the rubber spring, e.g. being embedded in it
Liquid springs in which the liquid works as a spring by compression, e.g. combined with throttling action; Combinations of devices including liquid springs
Magnetic springs; Fluid magnetic springs

title.ko: 진동감쇠장치 완충장치(유체를 사용하는 것 5/00, 9/00; 회전기구에 대하여 특성을 갖는 것 15/10)
title.en: Vibration-dampers; Shock-absorbers (using fluid F16F0005000000, F16F0009000000;specific for rotary systems F16F0015100000)
using friction between loose particles, e.g. sand

title.ko: 상대적으로 회전할 수 있는 면을 갖고 서로 압력을 가하는 것(7/01이 우선; 그 요소의 하나가 스프링인 것 13/02)
title.en: with relatively-rotatable friction surfaces that are pressed together (F16F0007010000 takes precedence;one of the members being a spring F16F0013020000)
in the direction of the axis of rotation
in a direction perpendicular or inclined to the axis of rotation

title.ko: 서로간에 직진운동할 수 있는 마찰면을 갖는 것
title.en: with friction surfaces rectilinearly movable along each other (F16F0007010000 takes precedence)
in dampers of the cylinder-and-piston type
using inertia effect
the inertia member being resiliently mounted
on plastics springs
on fluid springs
on metal springs
using plastic deformation of members
of cable-support type, i.e. frictionally-engaged loop-forming cables

title.ko: 스프링진동감쇠장치, 완충장치 또는 감쇠매체로서 유체 또는 그 균등물을 사용하는 것과 마찬가지로 조립된 운동감쇠장치(5/00이 우선; 유체제동기구를 갖는 개폐장치 E05F)
title.en: Springs, vibration-dampers, shock-absorbers, or similarly-constructed movement-dampers using a fluid or the equivalent as damping medium (F16F0005000000 takes precedence;connection of valves to inflatable elastic bodies B60C0029000000;door-operating appliances with fluid braking systems E05F)
using gas only
in a chamber with a flexible wall
the flexible wall being of the rolling diaphragm type
using both gas and liquid
in a chamber with a flexible wall
comprising a gas spring contained within a flexible wall, the wall not being in contact with the damping fluid, i.e. mounted externally on the damper cylinder
comprising a gas spring with a flexible wall provided within the cylinder on the piston rod of a monotubular damper or within the inner tube of a bitubular damper
comprising a gas spring with a flexible wall provided between the tubes of a bitubular damper
comprising a hydropneumatic accumulator of the membrane type provided on the upper or the lower end of a damper or separately from or laterally on the damper
using liquid only; using a fluid of which the nature is immaterial
Devices with one or more rotary vanes turning in the fluid, any throttling effect being immaterial
Devices with one or more members, e.g. pistons, vanes, moving to and fro in chambers and using throttling effect
involving only straight-line movement of the effective parts
with a closed cylinder and a piston separating two or more working spaces therein
with a single cylinder
with the piston-rod extending through both ends of the cylinder
with one or more cylinders, each having a single working space closed by a piston or plunger
with a single cylinder and a single piston or plunger
with two cylinders in line and with the two pistons or plungers connected together
with two parallel cylinders and with the two pistons or plungers connected together
with solid or semi-solid material, e.g. pasty masses, as damping medium

title.ko: 세부
title.en: Details

title.ko: 특수밸브구조(일반적인 밸브 F16K; 스로틀통로의 형상 또는 구조)
title.en: Special valve constructions (valves in general F16K); Shape or construction of throttling passages
Throttling passages operating with metering pins
Vortex flow passages
Throttling passages in the form of slots arranged in cylinder walls
Throttling passages in the form of annular discs operating in opposite directions
Special sealings, including sealings or guides for piston-rods
Covers for protection or appearance
Arrangements for preventing froth
Cooling arrangements
Filling arrangements, e.g. for supply of gas

title.ko: 댐퍼의 수동조절수단; 온도보정과 결합시킨 수단(9/53, 9/56이 우선; 온도보정 만은 9/52)
title.en: Means on or in the damper for manual or non-automatic adjustment; such means combined with temperature correction (F16F0009530000, F16F0009560000 take precedence;temperature correction only F16F0009520000)
allowing control from a distance

title.ko: 행정의 다른 부분에서 다른 감쇄효과를 얻기 위한 장치(9/53, 9/56이 우선)
title.en: Arrangements for providing different damping effects at different parts of the stroke (F16F0009530000, F16F0009560000 take precedence)
Stops limiting fluid passage, e.g. hydraulic stops

title.ko: 감쇠력 자동조정장치를 갖춘 특별한 수단(9/53, 9/56이 우선)
title.en: Special means providing automatic damping adjustment (F16F0009530000, F16F0009560000 take precedence)
Inertia-sensitive means
Means responsive to the velocity of movement of the piston
Means responsive to load action on the damper or fluid pressure in the damper
resulting in the damping effects during contraction being different from the damping effects during extension

title.ko: 온도변화가 있는 경우(외부조정과 결합된 것 9/44)
title.en: in case of change of temperature (combined with external adjustment F16F0009440000)
Means for adjusting damping characteristics by varying fluid viscosity, e.g. electromagnetically
Arrangements for attachment
Means for adjusting the length of, or for locking, the spring or damper, e.g. at the end of the stroke

title.ko: 행정을 제한하는 폐색(stop), 예. 실린더 밖 피스톤 로드에 배치(9/49가 우선)
title.en: Stroke limiting stops, e.g. arranged on the piston rod outside the cylinder (F16F0009490000 takes precedence)
Vibration-dampers or shock-absorbers working with both friction and a damping fluid

title.ko: 진동감쇠장치, 완충장치 또는 유체스프링과 같은 비유체형의 스프링을 포함한 스프링장치(5/00이 우선)
title.en: Units comprising springs of the non-fluid type as well as vibration-dampers, shock-absorbers, or fluid springs (F16F0005000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 스프링과 제동 수단과의 마찰접촉에 의하여 감쇠하는 것(마찰작용의 스파이럴 스프링 3/06)
title.en: damping by frictional contact between the spring and braking means (frictionally coacting wound springs F16F0003060000)

title.ko: 합성 수지 스프링과 댐퍼 둘 다를 포함하는 것, 예. 마찰 댐퍼
title.en: comprising both a plastics spring and a damper, e.g. a friction damper

title.ko: 유체댐퍼, 예 댐퍼의 유체 챔버벽을 형성하지 않은 합성 수지 스프링
title.en: the damper being a fluid damper, e.g. the plastics spring not forming a part of the wall of the fluid chamber of the damper (F16F0013260000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 댐퍼의 유체 챔버의 벽을 적어도 하나 형성한 합성 수지 스프링(13/20 ～ 13/24가 우선)
title.en: the plastics spring forming at least a part of the wall of the fluid chamber of the damper (F16F0013200000-F16F0013240000 take precedence)

title.ko: 벽의 일부가 유연성 박막 또는 그와 유사한 것으로 형성된 것(13/12 ～ 13/18이 우선)
title.en: the wall being at least in part formed by a flexible membrane or the like (F16F0013120000-F16F0013180000 take precedence)

title.ko: 단일 챔버를 갖는 댐퍼(13/14가 우선)
title.en: Single chamber dampers (F16F0013140000 takes precedence)
Units of the bushing type
specially adapted for receiving axial loads

title.ko: 평형 챔버의 위치 또는 모양에 특징이 있는 것, 예 링 모양의 합성 수지 스프링으로 둘러 쌓인 평형 챔버 (13/14가 우선)
title.en: characterised by the location or the shape of the equilibration chamber, e.g. the equilibration chamber surrounding the plastics spring or being annular (F16F0013140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 공기스프링을 포함하는 것에 특징이 있는 것(13/22가 우선)
title.en: characterised by comprising also a pneumatic spring (F16F0013220000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 동적댐퍼를 포함하는 것에 특징이 있는 것(관성효과를 사용하는 댐퍼 그 자체 7/10)
title.en: characterised by comprising also a dynamic damper (dampers using inertia effect per se F16F0007100000)
the central part of the unit being supported by one element and both extremities of the unit being supported by a single other element, i.e. double acting mounting

title.ko: 외부 조건에 대응하여 조정되거나 조절되는 것에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by adjusting or regulating devices responsive to exterior conditions

title.ko: 부싱 타입의 유닛을 채택한 것(13/30이 우선)
title.en: specially adapted for units of the bushing type (F16F0013300000 takes precedence)
comprising means for varying fluid viscosity, e.g. of magnetic or electrorheological fluids

title.ko: 시스템의 진동 억제 (차량 시트 서스펜션 장치 B60N2 / 50); 불균형한 힘을 피하거나 줄이기위한 수단 또는 장치, 예. 모션에 의한 것 (기계 또는 구조물의 정적 또는 동적 균형 시험 G01M1 / 00)
title.en: Suppression of vibrations in systems (vehicle seat suspension devices B60N0002500000); Means or arrangements for avoiding or reducing out-of-balance forces, e.g. due to motion (testing static or dynamic balance of machines or structures G01M0001000000)

title.ko: 비회전기구, 예. 왕복운동기구의 진동방지; 회전기구와 함께 운동하지 않는 부재를 사용하는 회전기구의 진동방지(적층체 B32B; 선박의 진동방지 B63; 조정여부에 불구하는 동적평형시험 G01M)
title.en: Suppression of vibrations of non-rotating, e.g. reciprocating, systems; Suppression of vibrations of rotating systems by use of members not moving with the rotating system (layered products B32B;suppression of vibration in ships B63)
using fluid means
comprising control arrangements

title.ko: 전자석에 의한 방법을 사용하는 것(9/53이 우선)
title.en: using electromagnetic means (F16F0009530000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 탄성수단을 사용하는 것(단일의 원리를 사용한 장치 또는 그 부착 1/00 ～ 13/00)
title.en: using elastic means (single elements or their attachment F16F0001000000-F16F0013000000)

title.ko: 금속스프링을 갖는 것(고무스프링을 갖는 것 15/08)
title.en: with metal springs (with rubber springs also F16F0015080000)
using only wound springs
using only leaf springs
with rubber springs

title.ko: 기구와 함께 운동하는 부재를 사용함으로 인한 회전기구의 진동 억제(평형에 의한 것 15/22; 변동하여 또는 간헐적으로 움직이는 플라이휠을 갖는 것 F16H)
title.en: Suppression of vibrations in rotating systems by making use of members moving with the system (by balancing F16F0015220000;with flywheels acting variably or intermittently F16H)

title.ko: 탄성부재나 마찰감쇄 부재를 사용하는 것, 예 회전축과 그 위에 설치된 축과의 상대 회전이 가능한 질량의 사이에 이용되는 것(15/16이 우선)
title.en: using elastic members or friction-damping members, e.g. between a rotating shaft and a gyratory mass mounted thereon (F16F0015160000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 탄성부재로서 스프링을 사용하는 것, 예 금속스프링(15/131이 우선)
title.en: using springs as elastic members, e.g. metallic springs (F16F0015131000 takes precedence)
Wound springs

title.ko: 합성수지 스프링, 예 고무제(15/123이 우선)
title.en: Plastics springs, e.g. made of rubber (F16F0015123000 takes precedence)
consisting of at least one annular element surrounding the axis of rotation
using plastics springs combined with other types of springs

title.ko: 마찰감쇄 수단에 특징이 있는 것(15/131이 우선)
title.en: characterised by friction-damping means (F16F0015131000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 두 개 또는 그 이상의 선회 질량으로 구성된 회전 시스템
title.en: the rotating system comprising two or more gyratory masses

title.ko: 탄성부재로서 스프링을 사용하는 것, 예 금속스프링
title.en: using springs as elastic members, e.g. metallic springs
Wound springs

title.ko: 합성수지 스프링, 예 고무제(15/134가 우선)
title.en: Plastics springs, e.g. made of rubber (F16F0015134000 takes precedence)
the elastic members consisting of two or more springs of different types
characterised by friction-damping means
using freely-swinging masses rotating with the system

title.ko: 유체를 사용하는 것(입력, 출력부분이 연결되어 있는 장치 F16D)
title.en: using a fluid (devices connecting input and output members F16D)
having an inertia member, e.g. ring
provided within a closed housing

title.ko: 전기적 방법을 사용하는 것 (발전장치 (dynamo- electric device)는 H02K)
title.en: using electric means (dynamo-electric devices H02K)
Suppression of vibrations of rotating systems by favourable grouping or relative arrangement of the moving members of the system or systems
Compensation of inertia forces
of crankshaft systems by particular disposition of cranks, pistons, or the like
of crankshaft systems using solid masses, other than the ordinary pistons, moving with the system

title.ko: 평형추; 그 부착장치
title.en: Counterweights; Attaching or mounting same (for roll-type closures E06B0009620000)

title.ko: 플라이 휠(15/16이 우선; 탄성부재 또는 마찰감쇄 부재를 사용하여 회전 시스템에서 진동을 억제하는 것 15/12; 일반적인 회전체 F16C 13/00, 15/00)
title.en: Flywheels (F16F0015160000 takes precedence;suppression of vibrations in rotating systems using elastic members or friction-damping members moving with the system F16F0015120000;rotary-body aspects in general F16C0013000000, F16C0015000000)
made of plastics, e.g. fibre reinforced plastics [FRP]
characterised by means for varying the moment of inertia

title.ko: 지지 장치에 특징이 있는 것,예.박제, 케이스, 축에 대한 내부부재의 안정(15/31이 우선)
title.en: characterised by their supporting arrangement, e.g. mountings, cages, securing inertia member to shaft (F16F0015310000 takes precedence)
Correcting- or balancing-weights or equivalent means for balancing rotating bodies, e.g. vehicle wheels
Fastening arrangements therefor
operating automatically
